headline: Union Steward, Allied Auto Workers Local 247 | Senior Assembler at Irongate Motor Assembly Plant
summary: Thirty years on the line and nine years standing up for the people next to me. Senior assembler and elected Union Steward with Allied Auto Workers Local 247 at the Irongate Motor Assembly Plant in Detroit. I handle grievances, sit on the negotiating committee, mentor newer stewards, and keep our members informed on contract negotiations, plant safety, and the fights that matter to working families. Proud Detroiter, lifelong believer in solidarity, and a firm reminder that an injury to one is an injury to all. I use this profile to follow labor organizing, union news, and the long history of the workers' movement.
